resultList.dtldesc: This well-appointed 1 BHK apartment in Vashi Sector 26 presents a premier residential opportunity in one of Navi Mumbai's most prestigious and sought-after localities. Spanning a super area of 600 sq. ft, the residence is situated on the 5th floor of a seven-storey building, offering a sophisticated and professional living environment. Developed within the last five years, this ready-to-move-in property is east-facing, ensuring a bright and airy atmosphere. It is an ideal choice for first-time buyers or investors looking for a high-yield asset in a prime urban setting known for its premium infrastructure and excellent connectivity.::::Property Specifications::The apartment features a functional and efficient layout consisting of one bedroom and one bathroom, designed to maximise the available space of 600 sq. ft. The unit is currently unfurnished, allowing the new owner the flexibility to customise the interiors with their preferred aesthetic and high-quality finishes. The flooring is done with durable ceramic tiles, which are easy to maintain and provide a clean, professional look. As a relatively new construction, the property is in excellent condition and is part of a co-operative society. Its position on a higher floor ensures better ventilation and a pleasant view of the main road, making it a peaceful retreat within a bustling city.::::Facilities::The property is equipped with essential facilities to ensure a comfortable and secure lifestyle. The building includes a modern lift for convenient access to all floors. Residents benefit from 24-hour water availability and a reliable electricity supply with rare power cuts. The property has received approval from the Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation, ensuring its legal standing and infrastructure quality. Its prime location near established landmarks like Gami Jade ensures that the surrounding environment is well-maintained and provides a secure, gated-community feel. These facilities make the apartment a practical and professional choice for modern urban living.::::Locality::Sector 26 in Vashi is one of Navi Mumbai's most elite residential neighbourhoods, offering an exceptional quality of life with all urban conveniences within easy reach. The property is located just 0.2 kms from Orchids The International School, making it highly convenient for families. The area is renowned for its excellent connectivity to the Vashi and Sanpada railway stations, as well as the Sion-Panvel Highway, facilitating effortless commutes to Mumbai and other parts of Navi Mumbai. The neighbourhood is well-served by premium shopping malls, reputable hospitals, and lush green parks, providing a perfect blend of professional convenience and leisure in a serene and peaceful environment.

resultList.dtldesc: An exceptional residential opportunity awaits in one of Navi Mumbai's most vibrant and rapidly developing nodes. Located within the esteemed Newa Garden project in Sector 20, Airoli, this charming multistorey apartment offers an ideal blend of contemporary architecture, premium facilities, and superb connectivity. Perfect for small families, working professionals, or astute investors, this ready-to-move-in property delivers a comfortable and sophisticated urban lifestyle.::::Property Specifications::This smartly designed apartment boasts a generous super area of 750 sq. ft and a comfortable carpet area of 450 sq. ft. Positioned on the 2nd floor of an impressive 15-storey tower, the flat benefits from a highly desirable east-facing orientation, ensuring ample natural light and positive energy throughout the day. The layout includes one well-sized bedroom, one modern bathroom, and a wide balcony that overlooks the main road, garden, and swimming pool. Adding immense practical value, the flat includes four additional utility spaces: a puja room, a study room, a store room, and a servant room. The interior comes unfurnished, featuring high-quality flooring crafted from a durable mix of ceramic tiles, elegant marble, and granite.::::Facilities::Residents of this co-operative society development enjoy access to standard modern infrastructure and premium amenities designed for a seamless living experience. The property includes a reliable power backup system and continuous water storage capabilities. Security is highly prioritised with trained security personnel and integrated fire-fighting equipment. For vehicular convenience, dedicated reserved parking and visitor parking slots are available.
